title: Savory Uruguayan Potato Burger
description: A pungent and shattering crowd-pleaser featuring potato buns and confit tomato, this Uruguayan dish is a satvik-friendly delight. It combines the flavors of South America with a unique twist.
instructions: Boil the potatoes until they are tender, then mash and shape into buns.
Confit the tomatoes by cooking them in olive oil over low heat for 2 hours.
Caramelize the onions by cooking them in olive oil over medium heat for 30 minutes.
Mix the garlic, salt, black pepper, and paprika into the mashed potatoes.
Assemble the burgers by placing a spoonful of confit tomato onto a potato bun.
Top with caramelized onions and serve immediately.
Let the burgers cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with your favorite toppings, such as avocado or salsa.
